testcase.name: test_shape_and_policy_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: cell 01 missing field present: {'in': '07:57', 'out': '20:01', 'ot_in': None, 'ot_out': None, 'hours': 0.0, 'duty_hours': 0.0, 'raw_hours': 0.0, 'ot_hours': 0.0, 'sources': ['bio'], 'punches': 4, 'anomaly': True, 'anomaly_reason': 'missing_punch'} assert 'present' in {'in': '07:57', 'out': '20:01', 'ot_in': None, 'ot_out': None, ...}

testcase.name: test_weekly_off_sundays

failure.message: AssertionError: day 12 expected weekly_off, got {'in': None, 'out': None, 'ot_in': None, 'ot_out': None, 'hours': 0.0, 'duty_hours': 0.0, 'raw_hours': 0.0, 'ot_hours': 0.0, 'sources': [], 'punches': 0} assert None is True + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf892fcd60680>('weekly_off') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf892fcd60680> = {'in': None, 'out': None, 'ot_in': None, 'ot_out': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter129_policy_attendance.py:117: in test_weekly_off_sundays assert cell.get("weekly_off") is True, f"day {d} expected weekly_off, got {cell}" E AssertionError: day 12 expected weekly_off, got {'in': None, 'out': None, 'ot_in': None, 'ot_out': None, 'hours': 0.0, 'duty_hours': 0.0, 'raw_hours': 0.0, 'ot_hours': 0.0, 'sources': [], 'punches': 0} E assert None is True E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf892fcd60680>('weekly_off') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf892fcd60680> = {'in': None, 'out': None, 'ot_in': None, 'ot_out': None, ...}.get
